title: Engine Provided Config
description: Pilot-managed provided config for the engine service. Bootstrap-owned fields such as nats_url, env, engine_id, grpc_host, grpc_port, kv_heartbeat_secs, discovery_bucket, and bootstrap_token are not part of this schema.

account_ids.description: Account identifiers bound to this engine.

kline_interval.description: Kline interval such as 1m or 5m. Empty string disables kline subscriptions.
